fullArticle:
Malta completed an unbeaten run to the FIBA European Championship for Small Countries title, pulling away late to beat Andorra 90-76..

Malta completed an unbeaten run to the FIBA European Championship for Small Countries title, pulling away late to beat Andorra 90-76 in the final at the Tercentenary Sports Hall. It was a tight contest through three quarters, with eight lead changes, before Malta took over. Trailing 53-48 late in the third, the Maltese caught fire from beyond the arc and the free-throw line, with Aaron Falzon (203....

Malta and Andorra will meet for the title at the FIBA European Championship for Small Countries after both cruised through the semifinals..
